designGaps: CRITICAL: Music system is completely broken — virtually every track path in music-manager.ts is WRONG. 28 out of ~30 referenced paths do not match actual file locations. The game is currently running in SILENCE for all zones except home (main-theme.mp3 is at root and works).
CRITICAL: Stinger/jingle system is broken — /audio/music/stingers/ directory does not exist. All 8 stinger paths reference non-existent files.
CRITICAL: Holiday music system references /audio/music/holidays/ directory which does not exist — 12 holiday tracks all broken.
15 out of 20 pages have no character art at all — characters are confined to 48x72px circular avatars on 5 pages maximum.
CharacterIdleWrapper component exists but is almost NEVER used in actual pages — all characters are static images.
Expression sheets exist for all 20 characters but are NEVER used in the game UI — the entire expression system is dead code.
8 characters (virus, phantom, barak, masterBeat, sakura, noa not on page, kai not on page, blaze) appear on ZERO pages.
Auth pages (login, register, join, student-setup) have zero gaming personality — look like generic SaaS forms.
Badges page is the most important reward screen but is the most visually boring — no animations, no character, generic Card.
Tips and Accessibility pages are text-only with zero gaming identity.
Shortcuts page (Mika's domain) has no Mika character and uses light-mode Tailwind active states that conflict with dark theme.
Leaderboard uses hardcoded mock data — not connected to Supabase backend.
Statistics page uses light-mode color classes (dark: variants) that partially fight with the dark gaming theme.
World music tracks (shatil, nevet, geza, anaf, tzameret) have NO zone mapping — age-specific themes are entirely unused.
Story mode music zone is broken — /audio/music/story-mode.mp3 does not exist.
Defeat music zone is broken — /audio/music/defeat.mp3 does not exist.
Loading music zone is broken — /audio/music/loading.mp3 does not exist.
Boss-battle-final zone is broken — /audio/music/boss-battle-final.mp3 does not exist.
Rival characters in battle (shadow, storm, bug) appear as 40-48px images only — no dramatic full-body rival reveal.
story/victory-celebration.mp3 and story/emotional-moment.mp3 tracks exist with 4 variants each but are NEVER triggered in code.
Several background images exist but are used at only 10% opacity — too subtle for gaming immersion (should be 20-30%).
lesson-view.tsx component exists but is not imported or used anywhere — dead code.
CharacterIdleWrapper and RivalNinja components are never used in any page component.
AchievementNotification and XPFloat effect components appear to be dead code.
StoryBeatWrapper component is unused.
SkipLink and OfflineIndicator components are not included in any page layout.
Missing empty states with character art — progress page, badges page, and statistics page show only text when no data exists.
No page transition animations between routes despite PageTransition component existing.
Jukebox page has no character (Master Beat should be the DJ) — just renders the Jukebox component with no game wrapper.
Battle rivals (Blaze, Barak, Virus, Glitch) have battle music files but cannot be selected in the battle UI.
criticalIssues: MUSIC SYSTEM BROKEN: 28/30 music paths in music-manager.ts point to non-existent files. The entire zone-based music system plays silence. Fix requires updating DEFAULT_ZONE_TRACKS to use correct subdirectory paths.
STINGER SYSTEM BROKEN: All 8 stinger paths (/audio/music/stingers/*.mp3) reference a non-existent directory. Level-up, victory, achievement, character-unlock sounds all play nothing.
HOLIDAY MUSIC BROKEN: All 12 holiday music paths (/audio/music/holidays/*.mp3) reference a non-existent directory.

CHARACTER EXPRESSION SYSTEM DEAD: 20 characters have expression sheets but the CHARACTER_CONFIGS only uses model-sheets (static images). The expression/mood system referenced in memory is not implemented in any page component.
CharacterIdleWrapper component exists but is used on 0 pages — the idle animation system is completely unused.
15 of 28 pages have NO character art whatsoever — the game's personality exists only in a few pages.
8 of 20 characters appear on zero pages (blaze, virus, phantom, barak, masterBeat, sakura, noa unassigned, kai unassigned).
Leaderboard is connected to mock data only — player rankings are fictional.

Story script exists for only chapters 1-3 with 26 beats; getAllChapterBeats() claims 6 chapters (53 beats) but chapters 4-6 story beats may be missing from actual script file (story-script.ts line count was 0 for character grep).
Progress page shows raw lesson IDs ('lesson-01') instead of Hebrew lesson titles in the completed lessons list.
